name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.5.4: actor refactor (closes #39) — class WordMCPServer → actor WordMCPServer for compiler-enforced concurrency safety; eliminates Dictionary races from parallel async mutations. v3.5.3: atomic-rename save (closes #36). v3.5.2: rels overlay merge (closes #35). v3.5.1: universal binary. Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.2.
